title: Tambayan, Philippines
desc: Escape to Tambayan Philippines in Second Life, a vibrant virtual haven for Filipinos worldwide. Explore unique areas like BGC Manila, Tondo, traditional villages, and the beach-themed Tambayan. Enjoy fishing and live music from talented Filipino artists. Visit for a joyful celebration of culture and connection in your tropical escape!

title: Titchy's Dreams Beach Club
desc: Imagine the sun kissing your skin, rhythmic waves soothing your senses, and music that beckons you to dance. Welcome to Titchy's Dreams Beach Club at Suraya Bay, a perfect blend of excitement and tranquility. A hidden gem that has been a loved destination for visitors since it began in 2007. You are invited to explore a world where every moment is filled with joy, relaxation, and friendship.

title: Blue Falls Oasis
desc: A beachside escape designed for connection, relaxation, and unforgettable moments. Lounge beneath swaying palms, drift through sun-soaked afternoons by the sparkling pool, and wander hand in hand along the warm shoreline as the waves roll in. Stylish hotel-inspired rentals offer a private retreat just steps from the sand, blending comfort, luxury, and coastal charm.

title: Kona Beach and Surfing
desc: Welcome to Kona Beach! Catch the waves, shop, play, and soak up the sun. Then dive in and explore a magical underwater world, home to mermaids and mermen.

title: Wet Spot Beach Club
desc: Wet Spot Beach Club celebrated 8 years of great music and friendly fun in a tropical setting where you'll feel right at home. It features a variety of live DJs daily. There are many scenic places to visit like the beautifully renovated beach, lush lagoon area, country rodeo, main club featuring a glass aquarium dance floor, and a gorgeous ballroom, as well as, many activities and themes to enjoy.

title: Cann!bal
desc: Take unbelievable photos on a total of 4 breathtaking virtual beach regions. Enjoy a multitude of exciting tropical activities, or just watch as their dynamic region windlight day cycles control the region-wide lights. This estate has been under development for more than 10 years and offers countless attractions seen nowhere else on the grid.

title: Baja Coast
desc: Experience the timeless beauty of Baja Coast, in this nostalgic, romantic tropical beach environment. Explore the coast and islands of this photogenic white sand tropical beach and take in the sights and sounds of nature with your friends and family, or maybe you just want some peaceful time alone. Don't forget your camera!

title: Oahu Paradise Island
desc: Oahu Paradise Island is the perfect place for romantic dates, vacations, exploring, and fun and games for couples and anyone who wants to have an all-inclusive experience in a setting bound to make you fall in love.

title: SunRayz Coast
desc: Imagine a Caribbean island paradise where lush jungle paths and warm sandy beaches lead to beautifully furnished homes, from serene jungle hideaways to stunning beachfront retreats by crystal‑clear waters. At its heart beats the vibrant SunRayz Beach Club, alive with colour, music, and that irresistible beach‑party energy. This tropical haven invites you to relax, rejuvenate, and celebrate life surrounded by nature’s beauty and the joyful rhythm of SunRayz.

title: Batterie Beach
desc: Discover Batterie Beach, a gritty boardwalk and amusement park infused with New Orleans spirit. This beachfront locale offers an edgy and urban escape. Stroll along the boardwalk, snap unforgettable photos, or simply absorb the vibrancy of this unique open space.

title: Hao Atoll in French Polynesia
desc: Hao is a tiny Tuamotus atoll in French Polynesia. This destination is inspired by Hao with pure Polynesian music and dance groups dressed in authentic costumes. There are magnificent places to discover and a few activities that are sure to keep you here. A teleporter will also welcome you to the Polynesian village of Hawaii with several Polynesian cultures that you can visit.

title: The Dive Shop
desc: The most realistic underwater environment and scuba simulation in Second Life; home to RL PADI diver training. Five beautiful, geographically themed shorelines drop to depths of 50 meters offering divers and free snorkelers an underwater tour around the world in a photogenic wonderland. Enjoy a beautiful beach and amazing hangouts in this newcomer-friendly region.

title: Kanaloa Surf Beach
desc: Explore with friends or loved ones at Kanaloa Beach, a surfing and marine sports spot in Second Life.

title: Isle of Moons
desc: At Isle of Moon, you can chill out, cuddle, or party in a beautiful place. Enjoy many sparkling moments with a loved one, or take a romp in the motel. Here you'll find retreat centers for couples, as well as a club and bar.

title: Island France Pittoresque
desc: Welcome to the photogenic beauty of a cozy grain of paradise. France Pittoresque is an archipelago bathed in warm light with sunkissed beaches and small islets. Enjoy this calm place for relaxation, meditation, romance, or love. You can read extracts of books about the history of France to travel through time.

title: Golds Metropolitan City
desc: Golds Metropolitan City is a hangout and beach destination with many places to relax, explore, and take photos. Amenities include G Corner Mart supermarket, arcade, bowling, golf, beaches, swimming areas, a water park, amusement rides, playgrounds, and parks. Walk, drive, or spend the day meeting friends. MyStory compatible.

title: Dutch Coast
desc: Dutch Coast is a beach destination where you can relax, take pics, or sit down and enjoy the sound of the waves and the seagulls.

title: Fantazia's Beach
desc: Fantazia's Beach is a gateway to the Zindra Ocean. Relax, have fun and enjoy the free jetskis.

title: Sexy Seaside Resort
desc: Welcome to Sexy Seaside Resort! Enjoy surfing, an amusement park, jet skiing, zip lining, hang gliding, the mermaid cove, TSE concerts, and much more! Cuddle spots, places to explore, and tree houses for rent. Home of the Oceanic Euphoria Club!

title: Kilikobo Shores and Beach
desc: Kilikobo Shores and Beach is a two-region destination with long and short-term rentals, scuba, boating, fishing, hang gliding, games, horseback riding, parasailing, surfing, and many other fun things to do to fill an afternoon or a few days to get away.

title: SL Surfing Association
desc: Welcome to the SL Surfing Archipelago, home of the SL Surfing Association and the SL Surfing Hall of Fame. Awesome waves are always running. There are free loaner boards for you to use, and a rez area to use your own. Plenty of beach for chillaxin'! Check out the video reel of radical SL Surfing videos. You'll also find freebies and much more! Join the tubular action.

title: Reggae Beaches Jamaica
desc: Come and discover the island through the endless amounts of great music, from Rock-steady, Reggae, Soul Funk, Hip Hop & RnB. Hear for yourselves why it's a peaceful and world-changing paradise.

title: Las Islas / Las Arenas
desc: A realistic tropical island that is a great place to relax, and listen to the tide crash on the shore. There are wild pools, a marina, and a large dance area that is equipped for live shows with DJs and streaming media and lots more!

title: Ash Falls
desc: A remote beach set in the Pacific Northwest for photos and soul searchers alike. Perfect for quiet romantic evenings, compelling photography or just hanging out with friends.

title: Kairi Beach
desc: A hidden jewel of Kalokairi, Kairi Beach is a small island escape where time slows, and the sun always lingers a little longer. Here, the vibe is effortless, carefree days, warm sands, and an endless sea stretching into the horizon. Unwind beneath the golden light, float peacefully in the water, or ride the waves on a jet ski. Share quiet moments, cuddle beneath the sky, or dance barefoot to the music.

title: Everwild Resort & Spa
desc: Everwild Resort and Spa is where luxury meets wild adventure. Set in a lush, tropical-inspired escape, Everwild blends high-end relaxation with unforgettable experiences. Unwind in the spa and wellness centre with soothing treatments, steam rooms, and tranquil spaces designed to melt everything away. Stay in one of the family-friendly themed lodges or enjoy a romantic hideaway designed for couples.

title: Barefoot Beach
desc: Barefoot Beach offers calming waters far from the chaos of everyday life. Visitors can wander soft sands, surf through the day, or relax along the shore as their thoughts drift with the waves.

title: Rum Cay
desc: Welcome to paradise! Rum Cay is a virtual re-creation of the beautiful islands of the Caribbean. Part of the Matrix VTT community, Rum Cay is a place for relaxing on the beach, partying in the clubs, and renting beautiful homes and skyboxes!

title: Sunvana
desc: Where the sun and nirvana meet - welcome to Sunvana. Discover the ultimate destination for relaxation and fun on a tropical, secluded island.

title: Arcady Magpies Nest Beach
desc: The Arcady Sailing Estate is a 20-region block of privately owned regions providing SL sailors with a dedicated area to enjoy their sailing and set up home if they wish. Magpies Nest is located on the Arcady Magpie region and provides beautifully discreet sunbathing areas for residents and visitors to enjoy. Included is a unique undersea viewing arena, where you can view the creatures of the deep in their natural habitat - a virtual sea aquarium.

title: Sisters
desc: Sisters offers a friendly destination with a beach, games, dancing, bowling, an art gallery, a farm, and plenty of photo spots. A dedicated photography platform with rez items makes it easy to capture the perfect shot.

title: Margarita Beach
desc: Margarita Beach is a tropical-themed beach location bounded by lush jungle with lots of secluded venues to relax.

title: Cottage and Vine Beach and Coral Reef oKhJBYSf
desc: Escape to where the shore glows with soft golden sand and the sea sparkles in endless shades of turquoise. Just beyond the shallows, a coral reef unfurls like a secret garden beneath the sea—alive with color and motion. Glide through crystal waters as sea turtles drift gracefully, and coral blooms in radiant hues. Hidden coves and calm inlets offer the perfect places to snorkel and explore.

title: Tropical Buds
desc: Tropical Buds invites you to unwind in a tropical haven — a blend of island beauty, mindful moments, and chill cannabis culture. Enjoy meditation circles, a café, photo contests, and chill beats! Good vibes only!

title: Nipplopolis
desc: Welcome to Nipplopolis, where the beach sizzles by day and lively nightlife takes over after dark. Get up close and personal with the dancers, catch live shows, or unwind in one of the themed lounges. Need a break? Explore the vibrant shops and unique boutiques. Bring your friends and create unforgettable memories here.

title: Ambergris Cay
desc: Ambergris Cay is an island with beaches and big surf waves.

title: Inception Isle
desc: Inception Isle is your ultimate one-stop resort. It offers a unique blend of luxury, adventure, and relaxation tailored to meet all your desires. Whether you are seeking a serene escape to unwind and rejuvenate or an action-packed adventure filled with thrilling adventures, this resort provides an array of amenities and experiences to suit every preference. The taxi on the beach awaits you!

title: One Love Beach eyodKGkF
desc: One Love Beach has great waves for surfing and a relaxed space to hang out. Enjoy the friendly vibe and catch some waves in this laid-back coastal destination.

title: Shadow Paw Bay
desc: Welcome to Shadow Paw Bay, a fun amusement park together with Club Pier and beaches. Enjoy picture-perfect moments in the various cuddle areas or bring the family along to enjoy the child-friendly play areas. No matter where you go in Shadow Paw Bay, there is a new adventure to explore and enjoy!

title: Shamone Beach
desc: Shamone Beach offers a serene coastal escape with soft sands, swaying seagrass, and gentle waves. Explore ten scenic areas featuring palm trees, seashells, lounge chairs, and jet skis. Enjoy ambient sounds of nature, spot water animals, or try surfing with a rezzable board. Perfect for relaxation or adventure by the shore.

title: Cuddles Beach
desc: At Cuddles Beach, dive into paradise where sand-kissed dreams come true! Escape the ordinary and awaken your senses in a stunning, one-of-a-kind haven, where turquoise waters lap at sugar-white sand and every sunrise paints the sky with fiery hues. Here, in this tropical paradise, lies your chance to truly live, not just exist.

title: Iona Shores
desc: Journey to a distant haven! The ideal retreat for those seeking serenity, rejuvenation, and nature's purest beauty. Boasting immaculate white shores, verdant forests, and majestic cliffs teeming with green, it's a sensory delight. This trio of secluded rental homes is the antidote for life's relentless pace. Bask in the sunlight, plunge into the transparent waters, and discover the untouched splendor of this region. Owned by White Dunes Estate, check the greeter info about their rentals and please be mindful of the tenants.

title: Serenity Cove
desc: Serenity Cove is a wild and wind-torn coastal region of sea-carved islands and rocky outcrops. Snuggle with a loved one and listen to the roar of the ocean in this truly atmospheric location. Owned by White Dunes Estate, check the greeter info about their rentals and please be mindful of the tenants.

title: Galapagos
desc: Lay on the black volcanic sands while the warm tropical waves lap at your feet. Rest your mind, body, and soul in and around the lagoons of this secret island destination. Owned by White Dunes Estate, check the greeter info about their rentals and please be mindful of the tenants.

title: Aqua Blue
desc: Relax, dip your toes into the water, and feel the fresh cool breeze upon your face. Let the atmospheric destination of Aqua Blue wash over you as time stands still. Owned by White Dunes Estate, check the greeter info about their rentals and please be mindful of the tenants.

title: Whispering Wind
desc: Lovers of Sun and Sea! Whispering Wind is a wonderful tropical dream escape. Perfect for surfers and beach bums alike! Partly public with 3 rentals and surf waves for all to use with surfboard rezzers on the beaches. Owned by White Dunes Estate, check the greeter info about their rentals and please be mindful of the tenants.

title: Christina and Wiwi's Heaven
desc: Christina and Wiwi's Heaven is a place to chill, dance, swim, cuddle, take photos, and chat. Christina and Wiwi are both bloggers that wanted to share their home with the community.

title: T'ai Surfing
desc: Welcome to T’ai Surfing! Come enjoy surfing, windsurfing, boating, kayaking, archery, and Dragon Riding. Enjoy breathtaking tropical views and a Zen Garden. You can also explore Mermaid Cove and underwater caves.

title: Big Sky Over Florence
desc: Enjoy the sea at Big Sky Over Florence. Listen to the calming ocean sounds and relax on the white sand beaches. Hang with friends on any of the public spaces or try your hand at some photography. There are plenty of pretty views. Simply enjoy the peace and tranquility of this lovely spot and unwind. Everyone is welcome! Owned by White Dunes Estate. Check the greeter for information about rentals and please be considerate of the tenants. Add your images to their Flickr group: flickr.com/groups/florenceatlowtide

title: Nazamur
desc: Nazamur is a little village off the French Riviera surrounded by beaches and a surf spot with a surfing simulator. It is an ideal place for relaxation and spending a good time with friends while enjoying the beautiful landscape.

title: NanoGunk Beaches & Surf
desc: White sand beaches and beautiful views of the distant waves. Come relax in this white sand tropical beach paradise, explore a mini jungle and the sand bars. Discover hidden places and places to cuddle watching the beautiful islands and waves. Try surfing the dual crest waves on a long long wave run, or jumping waves on a gxr jetski while trying to get on the scoreboard. Bring your camera!

title: Flotsam Beach
desc: Stroll along the boardwalk at Flotsam Beach, an area designed to evoke memories of East Coast American beach towns.

title: Epic Surf Center
desc: Home of Epic Surf Center, a destination packed with fun things to do, surfing, kayaking, skateboarding and so much more! Explore the region, lounge on the beach, and have fun! It is a surfer's paradise!

title: Cuddles Bay Beach
desc: Cuddles Bay Beach offers a relaxed, family-friendly destination for unwinding with loved ones or sharing a romantic moment. Visitors can enjoy a variety of activities, from surfing and balloon rides to bungee jumping, all set to music from popular DJs. With wedding options available, this beach is perfect for making unforgettable memories.
